name: FetchStreamTransport
description:
Production transport that connects to a LangGraph Platform API via HTTP and SSE.

Creates threads automatically if no threadId is provided, and streams events
using the LangGraph SDK client.

params.name: apiUrl
params.description: Base URL of the LangGraph Platform API

params.name: onThreadId
params.description: Optional callback invoked when a new thread is created

methods.name: joinStream
methods.signature: joinStream(threadId: string, runId: string, lastEventId: string | undefined, signal: AbortSignal)
methods.description: Join an already-started run without creating a new thread.

methods.name: stream
methods.signature: stream(assistantId: string, threadId: string | null, payload: unknown, signal: AbortSignal)
methods.description: Open a streaming connection, creating a thread if needed.

name: MockStreamTransport
description:
Test transport for deterministic agent testing without a real LangGraph server.

Script event batches upfront, then emit them manually or step through them
in your test specs. Supports error injection and close control.

params.name: script
params.description: Array of event batches. Each batch is emitted as a group.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Close the stream. Remaining queued events are drained before completion.

methods.name: emit
methods.description: Manually emit events into the stream.

methods.name: emitError
methods.description: Inject an error into the stream.

methods.name: isStreaming
methods.description: Returns true if a stream is currently active.

methods.name: nextBatch
methods.description: Advance to the next scripted batch and return its events.

methods.name: stream
methods.signature: stream(_assistantId: string, _threadId: string | null, _payload: unknown, signal: AbortSignal)
methods.description: Open a streaming connection to an agent and yield events.

name: Interrupt
description: An interrupt thrown inside a thread.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The ID of the interrupt.

properties.name: ns
properties.description: The namespace of the interrupt.

properties.name: resumable
properties.description: Whether the interrupt can be resumed.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The value of the interrupt.

properties.name: when
properties.description: Will be deprecated in the future.

name: StreamEvent
description: An event emitted by a LangGraph stream.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Event type identifier (e.g., 'values', 'messages', 'error', 'interrupt').

name: StreamResourceConfig
description:
Global configuration for streamResource instances.
Properties set here serve as defaults that can be overridden per-call.

properties.name: apiUrl
properties.description: Base URL of the LangGraph Platform API (e.g., `'http://localhost:2024'`).

properties.name: transport
properties.description: Custom transport implementation. Defaults to FetchStreamTransport.

name: StreamResourceOptions
description: Options for creating a streaming resource via streamResource.

properties.name: apiUrl
properties.description: Base URL of the LangGraph Platform API.

properties.name: assistantId
properties.description: Agent or graph identifier on the LangGraph platform.

properties.name: filterSubagentMessages
properties.description: When true, subagent messages are filtered from the main messages signal.

properties.name: initialValues
properties.description: Initial state values before the first stream response arrives.

properties.name: messagesKey
properties.description: Key in the state object that contains the messages array. Defaults to `'messages'`.

properties.name: onThreadId
properties.description: Called when a new thread is auto-created by the transport.

properties.name: subagentToolNames
properties.description: Tool names that indicate a subagent invocation.

properties.name: threadId
properties.description: Thread ID to connect to. Pass a Signal for reactive thread switching.

properties.name: throttle
properties.description: Throttle signal updates in milliseconds. `false` to disable.

properties.name: toMessage
properties.description: Custom message deserializer for non-standard message formats.

properties.name: transport
properties.description: Custom transport. Defaults to FetchStreamTransport.

name: StreamResourceRef
description: Reactive reference returned by streamResource. All properties are Angular Signals.

properties.name: activeSubagents
properties.description: Filtered list of subagents with status 'running'.

properties.name: branch
properties.description: Current branch identifier for time-travel navigation.

properties.name: error
properties.description: Last error, if any.

properties.name: getMessagesMetadata
properties.description: Get metadata for a specific message by index.

properties.name: getToolCalls
properties.description: Get tool call results associated with an AI message.

properties.name: hasValue
properties.description: True once at least one value or message has been received.

properties.name: history
properties.description: Full execution history of the current thread.

properties.name: interrupt
properties.description: Current interrupt data, if the agent is paused for input.

properties.name: interrupts
properties.description: All interrupts received during the current run.

properties.name: isLoading
properties.description: True when the resource is actively streaming.

properties.name: isThreadLoading
properties.description: True while a thread switch is loading state from the server.

properties.name: joinStream
properties.description: Join an already-running stream by run ID.

properties.name: messages
properties.description: Current list of messages from the agent conversation.

properties.name: reload
properties.description: Re-submits the last input to restart the stream.

properties.name: setBranch
properties.description: Set the active branch for time-travel navigation.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Current resource status: idle, loading, resolved, or error.

properties.name: stop
properties.description: Abort the current stream.

properties.name: subagents
properties.description: Map of active subagent streams keyed by tool call ID.

properties.name: submit
properties.description: Send a message or resume from an interrupt. Returns immediately.

properties.name: switchThread
properties.description: Switch to a different thread, resetting derived state.

properties.name: toolCalls
properties.description: Completed tool calls with their results.

properties.name: toolProgress
properties.description: Progress updates for currently executing tools.

properties.name: value
properties.description: Current agent state values.

name: StreamResourceTransport
description: Transport interface for connecting to a LangGraph agent.

name: SubagentStreamRef
description: Reference to a subagent's streaming state.

properties.name: messages
properties.description: Messages from the subagent conversation.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Current execution status of the subagent.

properties.name: toolCallId
properties.description: The tool call ID that spawned this subagent.

properties.name: values
properties.description: Current state values from the subagent.

properties.name: durability
properties.description:
Whether to checkpoint during the run (or only at the end/interruption).
- `"async"`: Save checkpoint asynchronously while the next step executes (default).
- `"sync"`: Save checkpoint synchronously before the next step starts.
- `"exit"`: Save checkpoint only when the graph exits.

properties.name: onError
properties.description:
Callback that is called when an error occurs during this specific submit call.
Unlike the hook-level `onError`, this allows handling errors on a per-submit basis,
e.g. to show a retry button or a specific error message to the user.

properties.name: streamResumable
properties.description:
Mark the stream as resumable. All events emitted during the run will be temporarily persisted
in order to be re-emitted if the stream is re-joined.

properties.name: streamSubgraphs
properties.description:
Whether or not to stream the nodes of any subgraphs called
by the assistant.

properties.name: threadId
properties.description:
The ID to use when creating a new thread. When provided, this ID will be used
for thread creation when threadId is `null` or `undefined`.
This enables optimistic UI updates where you know the thread ID
before the thread is actually created.

properties.name: checkpoint
properties.description: Checkpoint of the thread state

properties.name: created_at
properties.description: Time of state creation

properties.name: metadata
properties.description: Metadata for this state

properties.name: next
properties.description: The next nodes to execute. If empty, the thread is done until new input is received

properties.name: parent_checkpoint
properties.description: The parent checkpoint. If missing, this is the root checkpoint

properties.name: tasks
properties.description: Tasks to execute in this step. If already attempted, may contain an error

properties.name: values
properties.description: The state values

name: InferBag
description:
Infer the Bag type from an agent, defaulting to the provided Bag.

Currently returns the provided Bag for all types.
Can be extended in the future to extract Bag from agent types.

name: ResourceStatus
description:
Runtime constant mirroring Angular's ResourceStatus string-union type.
Angular 21 ships ResourceStatus as a pure string-union type (no runtime value),
so we provide a const-object shim for code that needs runtime comparisons.

name: provideStreamResource
description:
Angular provider factory that registers global defaults for all
streamResource instances in the application.

Add to your `app.config.ts` or module providers array.

params.name: config
params.description: Global configuration merged with per-call options

name: streamResource
description:
Creates a streaming resource connected to a LangGraph agent.

Must be called within an Angular injection context (component constructor,
field initializer, or `runInInjectionContext`). Returns a ref object whose
properties are Angular Signals that update in real-time as the agent streams.
signature: streamResource(options: StreamResourceOptions<T, InferBag<T, Bag>>): StreamResourceRef<T, InferBag<T, Bag>>
